rules.note: Four-character idiom/fixed idiom layer; ordinary four-character combinations are excluded from base.

warnings: Seed format is canonical_term JSONL for existing lexicon:build pipeline.
All generated entries use domains=[general]; current FW enabledDomains must include general or domain filter must be adjusted before runtime use.
repairTarget=true is set intentionally because current FW pick path requires repairTarget candidates.
